hero.heading: Shipping & Payments
hero.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our shipping methods, delivery times, and payment options.

sections.title: Processing Time
paragraphs: Orders are typically processed within 1-2 business days, excluding weekends and holidays.
You will receive an email confirmation with tracking information once your order has shipped.
Custom orders that are not regularly stocked require a **21-day lead time** for COAs and shipping.

sections.title: Shipping Charges
paragraphs: Free shipping is available on most orders.
Shipping costs are calculated at checkout based on your location and selected delivery method.

sections.title: Customs & Import Duties
paragraphs: International orders may be subject to customs fees or import duties, which are the responsibility of the customer.
Please check with your local customs office before placing an international order.

sections.title: Accepted Payment Methods
paragraphs: We accept the following secure payment options:
items: Credit and debit cards (Visa, MasterCard, American Express)
Bank transfer for large orders (contact support)
sections.extra: All payments are processed through secure, encrypted gateways. Peptide Pure does not store credit card information.

sections.title: Order Security
paragraphs: Personal and payment information is encrypted and protected using SSL (Secure Socket Layer) technology.
Industry-standard security practices are used to ensure safe transactions.
